brief_60s.On est ou: Wave06 verification gates are green: | `./.venv/bin/python tests/verify_wave06_nova.py`
brief_60s.On va ou: Start Wave07 on two active lanes plus one advisory lane: | Lane A (`@victor`): backend hardening + telemetry quality lock.
brief_60s.Pourquoi: dispatch regression if registry and fallback paths diverge | false GO/HOLD if SLO verdict lacks enough latency samples

objective: Close Wave06 officially and open Wave07 hardening with runtime control intact.

items.label: Objective
items.value: Close Wave06 officially and open Wave07 hardening with runtime control intact.

items.label: Next milestone
items.value: Start Wave07 on two active lanes plus one advisory lane:

items.label: Focus
items.value: creative_science_lead L1 pour vulgarisation et conseil evidence-first.

items.label: Angle
items.value: Transformer signaux runtime en decisions operateur claires et actionnables.

issues.objective: Build reliable catalog fetch with local cache and network fallback behavior.
issues.title: Skills catalog fetch cache fallback

issues.objective: Enforce curated-only policy with fail-open behavior and explicit warning logs.
issues.title: Policy engine curated fail-open

issues.objective: Add installer wrapper with idempotent install behavior and dry-run support.
issues.title: Installer wrapper idempotence

issues.objective: Generate deterministic `memory.index.json` from project memory/chat/journal signals.
issues.title: Memory index generator v2

issues.objective: Add MCP tools `list_skills_catalog` and `sync_skills` with dry_run support.
issues.title: MCP tools for skills catalog and sync

issues.objective: Build sidebar panel for Skills Ops status and last sync metadata.
issues.title: UI Skills Ops panel

issues.objective: Add `Sync now` action with immediate user feedback and disabled/loading states.
issues.title: UI Sync now with feedback

issues.objective: Add clear badges for sync health, memory index freshness, and warning states.
issues.title: UI observability badges for sync and memory

issues.objective: Make fail-open and network-down behavior explicit in UI without blocking workflows.
issues.title: UI fail-open and network-down states
Issue: Integrate HTML Docs (Roadmap & Tournament) into Cockpit UI

issues.objective: Produce final UI QA evidence pack for CP-01 (screenshots + manual steps + pass/fail).
issues.title: UI QA evidence pack for checkpoint

issues.objective: Deliver Victor L3 Fight 15 dual-stage outputs (markdown FINAL + self-contained HTML) with tournament compliance.
issues.title: Victor L3 Fight 15 dual-stage submission

issues.objective: Keep runtime gates green on a fixed 60-minute cadence during Wave04.
issues.title: Wave04 control loop cadence

issues.objective: Lock UI render and CP-0015 evidence lane for ship readiness.
issues.title: Wave04 UI ship lock

issues.objective: Lock backend MCP and memory contracts with deterministic proof.
issues.title: Wave04 backend contract lock

issues.objective: Decide canonical spec, canonical venv, and canonical V2 docs root.
issues.title: Wave04 cleanup canonicalization

issues.objective: Build and lock Wave04 dispatch pack plus ship-ready operator packet.
issues.title: Wave04 dispatch pack and operator packet

issues.objective: Use `/agents/registry.json` as runtime source of truth for roster metadata and provider mapping.
issues.title: Wave05 agent registry runtime

issues.objective: Remove odd/even runtime mapping whenever registry exists.
issues.title: Wave05 platform mapping from registry

issues.objective: Add deterministic task-to-agent ranking with weighted scoring.
issues.title: Wave05 task scoring engine

issues.objective: Enforce dynamic dispatch cap using queue signal and hard cap guardrail.
issues.title: Wave05 dispatch backpressure

issues.objective: Add provider chain fallback `codex -> antigravity -> ollama` under feature flag.
issues.title: Wave05 router tiered fallback

issues.objective: Emit CAD cost events per execution and expose monthly estimate.
issues.title: Wave05 cost telemetry CAD

issues.objective: Compute and display SLO gate verdict GO/HOLD from p95/p99/success metrics.
issues.title: Wave05 SLO gates

issues.objective: Establish Nova as the global L1 agent for creative/scientific reasoning tasks.
issues.title: Wave06 Nova global L1

next: Start Wave07 on two active lanes plus one advisory lane:
Lane A (`@victor`): backend hardening + telemetry quality lock.
Lane B (`@leo`): UI polish + vulgarisation/timeline clarity lock.
Lane C (`@nova`): creative/science recommendations integrated into operator flow.
now: Nova L1 files are present and loaded under project roster:
risks: dispatch regression if registry and fallback paths diverge
false GO/HOLD if SLO verdict lacks enough latency samples
cost estimate drift if provider rates stay default too long
